Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Chris Hersom of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Ronnie Cameron

RULING:
DEFENDANT COOPER INDUSTRIES, LLC (FKA COOPER INDUSTRIES, INC.)'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Cooper Industries LLC (F/K/A Cooper Industries, Inc.)'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and declaration, defendant's responses to General Order No. 129 interrogatories and the deposition testimony of Mr. Wilson create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (Chico X damming material) attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's declaration are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
